evidenceSnippetOriginal: Faculty should be clear with students they're teaching and advising about their policies on permitted uses, if any, of generative AI in classes and on academic work. Students are also encouraged to ask their instructors for clarification about these policies as needed.
evidenceLocator: Adhere to local academic and administrative policies section
